name: Ghent Group House
sourceStatus: Public Airbnb facts checked May 27, 2026; collection role needs host confirmation
title: A modern Ghent house for groups of up to ten.
tagline: A spacious station-side house with garden, terrace, BBQ, and a perfect public review score.
description: This public Airbnb listing is co-hosted by Laurens and adds a strong group-stay option to the House of Wander data model. Its final House of Wander brand role still needs confirmation.
publicListingTitle: Well located, modern spacious house for 10 people.

media.caption: Owner-approved group house hero photo needed

sourceAudit.value: Well located, modern spacious house for 10 people.

listingHighlights.label: Top 5%
listingHighlights.value: Airbnb marks this home as top 5% based on ratings, reviews, and reliability.

listingHighlights.label: Group fit
listingHighlights.value: The public listing positions it for groups of friends or large families, with space for up to 10 people.

listingHighlights.label: Quiet station-side location
listingHighlights.value: The page describes a quiet street near Gent-Sint-Pieters, with train, tram, bus, taxi, shops, bars, restaurants, and supermarkets nearby.

stayStory.title: The stay
stayStory.text: A modern spacious house with terrace, BBQ, and garden, designed for larger families or groups of friends.

stayStory.title: The connection
stayStory.text: The listing is hosted by Veronique with Laurens as co-host, which makes it relevant to the House of Wander ecosystem but not yet fully branded.

stayStory.title: The guest fit
stayStory.text: This fills a different need than Casa Fabiola: bigger groups, more social space, and a full house rather than an apartment.

stayStory.title: The handoff
stayStory.text: Booking remains on Airbnb while the team decides whether this stay joins the public House of Wander collection.

bookingSteps: Use Airbnb to confirm live dates, price, cancellation policy, and final availability.
Select the correct guest count, with 10 guests maximum as the current public maximum.
Keep payment and guest-host messaging inside Airbnb until a direct booking layer is approved.
Use House of Wander for story, comparison, guidance, and source-labelled decision support.
houseNotes: Carbon monoxide alarm and smoke alarm listed.
Collection role and final House of Wander name still need confirmation.
locationNote: The listing is in Ghent near Gent-Sint-Pieters station, with many transport connections and city amenities within walking distance.

amigoPrompts.label: Is this in the collection?
amigoPrompts.answer: This Airbnb listing is in Laurens’ account links and is co-hosted by Laurens, but the final House of Wander brand role still needs confirmation. The public listing facts are integrated safely.

amigoPrompts.label: Who is it for?
amigoPrompts.answer: It is the larger Ghent option: up to 10 guests, 3 bedrooms, 5 beds, terrace, garden, BBQ, and strong public review proof.

amigoPrompts.label: How do I book?
amigoPrompts.answer: Use Airbnb for live dates, price, cancellation, payment, and host messaging. House of Wander is the guided information layer for now.
